prompt: I am in the clankeroverflow repo. Give me an agent-safe workflow that searches ClankerOverflow first for `nextjs cache tags`, and if nothing relevant is found, logs a new solution from `notes/cache-fix.md` with problem title `Fix stale Next.js cache component data` and tags `nextjs,cache,ppr`.
assertions: Includes a `clanker search` command for query `nextjs cache tags` with `--limit 1`.
Includes a `clanker log` command that uses both `--problem` and `--file` (file path `notes/cache-fix.md`).
Uses problem title `Fix stale Next.js cache component data` and tags `nextjs,cache,ppr` in the log flow.
States to log only when search has no relevant result (search-first conditional behavior).
